page: Microsoft Azure EC96as_cc_v5 is an x86_64 architecture server instance belonging to the ECACCV5 family, powered by AMD processors. Running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this instance features 96 dedicated virtual CPUs and 672.0 GB of system memory, yielding a resource density of 7.0 GB of RAM per vCPU. The instance does not include any bundled local storage, but it is designated as Premium Storage capable, requiring external block storage attachments for persistent data.

The hardware profile of this instance emphasizes high memory capacity relative to compute resources, positioning it as a memory-optimized resource. It lacks integrated graphics processing units and complimentary public IPv4 addresses. From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated CPU allocation and high memory-to-core ratio provide a dense environment for workloads requiring substantial memory footprints without the overhead of local storage maintenance, though users must factor in the additional cost of external storage volumes.

Given the 96 dedicated vCPUs and 672.0 GB of RAM, this server is configured for memory-intensive enterprise workloads. Suitable applications include large-scale relational databases, in-memory caching systems, enterprise resource planning systems, and data analytics pipelines that process large datasets entirely within system memory.
description: Microsoft Azure EC96as_cc_v5 is an x86_64 memory-optimized server instance from the ECACCV5 family, powered by AMD processors and managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 96 dedicated vCPUs and 672.0 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-core ratio of 7.0 GB per vCPU. The instance does not include bundled local storage or integrated GPUs, but it is Premium Storage capable, allowing high-performance external storage attachments. With zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses, network access must be configured externally. This configuration is designed for memory-intensive enterprise workloads, such as large-scale databases, in-memory data analytics, and enterprise resource planning systems, where dedicated compute resources and a substantial memory footprint are required to process large datasets efficiently.
og_description: Microsoft Azure EC96as_cc_v5 is an x86_64 memory-optimized server with 96 dedicated AMD vCPUs, 672.0 GB of RAM, and Premium Storage capability, designed for large-scale database and enterprise workloads.

tagline: A memory-optimized x86_64 server featuring ninety-six dedicated AMD vCPUs and substantial memory capacity for demanding enterprise database workloads.
bullet_points: 96 dedicated AMD vCPUs on x86_64 architecture
672.0 GB of system memory providing 7.0 GB per vCPU
Premium Storage capable for high-performance external block storage
No bundled local storage or integrated GPUs
Designed for in-memory databases and enterprise applications
